description: Build packages/gaming - Complete mini-game engine with game state machine, 2D physics, sprites, game loop, particle system, multiplayer sync, leaderboards, achievements, tournaments, and game templates
steps: Create packages/gaming/src/types.ts with all type definitions: GameState, StateTransition, Vector2D, RigidBody, Collision, Sprite, SpriteSheet, AnimationFrame, Particle, ParticleEmitter, InputEvent, InputType, ScoreEntry, LeaderboardConfig, Achievement, AchievementCondition, MultiplayerState, GameTemplate, GameEconomy, Tournament, DailyChallenge, GameAnalyticsEvent
Create packages/gaming/src/core/state-machine.ts - Game state machine: states, transitions with conditions, enter/exit callbacks, state history, parallel states, hierarchical states. ~400 lines

Create packages/gaming/src/core/physics-engine.ts - 2D physics: gravity, velocity, acceleration, AABB collision detection, circle collision, rigid body dynamics, impulse resolution, spatial hashing for broad phase, forces/torque. ~500 lines

Create packages/gaming/src/core/sprite-manager.ts - Sprite sheets, animation frames with timing, sprite rendering state, animation sequences, flip/rotate/scale transforms, sprite atlas management. ~350 lines

Create packages/gaming/src/core/game-loop.ts - Fixed timestep game loop: delta time calculation, interpolation for rendering, update/render separation, FPS tracking, pause/resume, time scaling. ~300 lines

Create packages/gaming/src/core/input-handler.ts - Touch, keyboard, accelerometer input handling. Event normalization, gesture recognition (tap, swipe, pinch), key mapping, input buffering. ~350 lines

Create packages/gaming/src/core/particle-system.ts - Particle emitters, forces (gravity, wind, turbulence), lifetime/decay, color interpolation, size curves, burst emission, object pooling. ~400 lines

Create packages/gaming/src/core/leaderboard-system.ts - Score tracking (global, friends, weekly), ranking algorithms, score submission with anti-cheat validation, pagination, real-time updates. ~350 lines
Create packages/gaming/src/core/achievement-system.ts - Achievement definitions, unlock conditions (count, streak, combo), badge/reward system, progress tracking, notification triggers. ~350 lines

Create packages/gaming/src/core/multiplayer-sync.ts - Authoritative server state, client prediction, lag compensation (input buffering, state rollback), state interpolation, conflict resolution. ~450 lines

Create packages/gaming/src/core/game-templates.ts - Template definitions for quiz, puzzle, runner, match-3, word games. Each template provides initial state, rules, win conditions, scoring. ~400 lines
Create packages/gaming/src/core/game-economy.ts - In-game currency (coins, gems), power-ups, lives system, purchase/spend transactions, daily rewards, economy balancing. ~350 lines
Create packages/gaming/src/core/tournament-system.ts - Tournament brackets (single/double elimination), matchmaking (ELO-based), prize distribution, scheduling, real-time standings. ~400 lines
Create packages/gaming/src/core/game-analytics.ts - Play time tracking, completion rates, drop-off points, session metrics, daily challenges with streak tracking. ~300 lines
acceptance_criteria: packages/gaming/src/index.ts exists and exports all public APIs
PhysicsEngine implements AABB and circle collision detection with spatial hashing
GameLoop runs at fixed timestep with interpolation
ParticleSystem supports emitters, forces, and object pooling
MultiplayerSync implements client prediction and lag compensation
TournamentSystem implements bracket generation and ELO matchmaking
All files are 300-500 lines with real implementations
findings: All 15 files created (types.ts + 13 core implementations + barrel export). 7119 lines of code added. Test passes with 24 packages validated. No warnings or issues.
